Engineering Solutions

Industrial Grade.
Architectural Precision.

From domestic infrastructure upgrades to heavy-duty industrial installations — we build, automate, and secure complete power systems.

Explore Chapters
01 // DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE

Home Electrical Solutions

We design and install complete electrical systems for homes of all sizes — from new construction to full rewiring of existing properties. Our licensed electricians follow Kerala Electricity Board standards ensuring safety, compliance, and energy efficiency.

  • Complete home wiring & rewiring
  • Distribution board installation
  • Energy-efficient LED lighting
  • Appliance connection & installation
  • Earth leakage protection (ELCB/MCB)
  • Switchboard upgrades & modernization
ResidentialApartmentsVillasHousing Projects
Request Engineering Quote
02 // HEAVY INDUSTRY

Industrial Power Systems

We handle the full spectrum of industrial electrical work — from heavy machinery wiring to complete power distribution systems. Our experienced team understands industrial safety standards and delivers installations that maximize uptime and efficiency.

Engineering Specifications

Max Load Capacity

Up to 11KV Systems

Compliance Standards

CEA & KEB Standards

Panel Capability

MCC, PCC Boards

Testing Cycle

Comprehensive (FLIR)

Included Solutions

  • Heavy-duty power distribution
  • Industrial machine wiring
  • MCC & PCC panel installation
  • Power factor correction
  • Earthing & lightning protection
  • Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC)
Request Infrastructure Proposal

Live Deployment

Industrial Plant Distribution

ManufacturingFactories
03 // POWER BACKUP SYSTEMS

ATS & AMF Panel Setup

Our ATS/AMF solutions provide instantaneous power switchover, protecting your operations from costly downtime. We design, install, and maintain panels to match your specific load requirements and generator capacity.

Critical Target Sectors

HospitalsHotelsCommercial BuildingsData Centers
Design Backup System
ATS-AMF Specifications ACTIVE CERTIFIED
Transfer Time Standard: < 100ms switchover latency
Gen-Set Sync Auto-start command line with pre-heat delay controller
Phase Monitoring Over/Under voltage and phase-sequence mismatch cut-off
Diagnostics Integrated LED display for live phase telemetry & fault history

Setup Includes

Automatic Transfer Switch (ATS) installation AMF panel design & commissioning Generator synchronization panels Load management systems Remote monitoring integration Testing & commissioning reports

Automation Process Architecture

Inputs Sensors / Voice / Mobile Trigger
Central Processor PLC / IoT Gateway Hub
Outputs Lighting / HVAC / Machine Relay
04 // SMART SYSTEM LOGIC

Automation & Smart Control

From smart lighting and climate control to full PLC-based industrial automation, we bring intelligent systems to your home or facility. Our automation solutions reduce energy consumption while improving comfort and operational efficiency.

  • Smart home lighting control
  • HVAC automation & control
  • PLC-based industrial automation
  • IoT sensor integration
  • Energy monitoring dashboards
  • Remote access & control systems
Smart HomesHotelsFactoriesCommercial Complexes
Design Intelligent Control System
05 // DATA INFRASTRUCTURE

Structured Cabling & Networks

We provide complete structured cabling solutions following TIA/EIA standards, supporting high-speed data transmission for modern business needs. From server room builds to campus-wide network deployments, our installations are built to last.

Compliance & Topology

TIA/EIA Compliant Network Architecture

Cat6 / Cat6A Certified Cabling

Certified for gigabit speed and high-load transmission lanes with minimum cross-talk.

Fiber Optic Integration

Multi-mode and single-mode backbones for campus-wide connectivity.

Rack & Cabinet Management

Neat layout, patch panel configuration, logical labeling, and Fluke network certification reports.

OfficesIT CompaniesSchools
Get Cabling Layout Proposal →
06 // INTEGRATED SECURITY

Surveillance & Security Systems

We install comprehensive security systems combining IP/HD CCTV cameras, NVR/DVR recording, biometric access control, and integrated alarm systems. Our solutions provide 24/7 monitoring capability with remote access via smartphone.

HD/4K IP & Analog CCTV cameras
NVR/DVR recording systems
Remote viewing (mobile app)
Biometric access control
Burglar & fire alarm systems
Video intercom installation
ResidencesOfficesRetailSchoolsHospitals
Design Surveillance Grid
SECURE CHANNEL

Remote 4K Live Camera Feeds with Mobile Access

Maintenance SLA Matrix 24/7 Priority Support
Emergency SLA < 2 Hours Response Time (Kerala region)
General Faults Same-day diagnostic and system rectifications
Preventive AMC Monthly/Quarterly thermography and switchgear checks

Included Coverage

24/7 emergency electrical repair Fault detection & diagnosis Preventive maintenance schedules Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC) Wiring fault & short circuit repair Safety audits & compliance reports
07 // SYSTEM VIGILANCE

Repair & Maintenance

Electrical faults can cause costly downtime and safety hazards. Our rapid-response team provides emergency call-outs, systematic fault diagnosis, and preventive maintenance programs that keep your electrical systems running safely year-round.

Setup Maintenance Plan
Free Estimates · No Obligation
